title: Comparative Genocide Systems Lab
public_claim: This package transforms a previously-dispersed comparative-genocide research program into an engineering-ready MuranoOS room specification.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It gives mass-violence analysis a comparative systems surface: cases can be compared through mechanisms, warning signs, institutions, rhetoric, and escalation pathways rather than treated as isolated atrocities.
